title: solanum circinatum subsp. ramosum
intro: Solanum circinatum subsp. ramosum, also known as the variegated flea bane, is a plant species within the Solanaceae family that is native to Australia and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Solanum circinatum subsp. ramosum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions.
